chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.S-23 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on M.A No.1752/2024 (Ex/A) 2. For orders on M.A No.1753/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 28-7-2025 Applicant Ghulam Murtaza is present in person Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, DPG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant, present, does not wish to press the instant Crl. Revision Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as withdrawn, along with pending applications. JUDGE Naveed Ali
